The '''composite armor''' was an [[Armor/Legends|assault armor]] popular among [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and criminals during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was a heavy armor type, made of modern, synthetic materials.<ref name="SWG" /> It offered a high degree of protection against kinetic damage but lesser protection from energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="SWG:CU" /> The complete armor set included helmet, breastplate, left and right biceps, left and right bracers, gloves, pants and boots. It was available in several colors.<ref name="SWG" />

Variants of this armor included the '''Demolitionist armor''' appreciated by [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], the '''Stalker armor''' worn by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and the '''Field Command armor''' sometimes used by [[Officer/Legends|officers]].<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], composite armors were used by [[Sith Shadows|Sith Shadow]] thugs.<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=Sith Shadow Thug}}</ref> A composite armor helmet was also worn by the [[Mauler Usurper]].<ref name="SWG:TPW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Typho - Police Work|Naboo}}</ref> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a trader encountered the [[Sanyassan Marauders|Sanyassan Marauder]] [[armorsmith]] [[Macchbraus]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. Macchbraus requested the trader to craft him [[Bone armor|bone]], [[Padded armor/Legends|padded]], [[Mabari armor|Mabari]] and composite armors in exchange for teaching him to create [[Marauder Assault Armor|Marauder]] [[Marauder Reconnaissance Armor|armors]].<ref name="SWG:GU5">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Game Update 5}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Composite armor was one of many types of armor wearable by players in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
